Software Engineer  
Stockholm, Sweden  
March 2021 - Present  

At NordFin Tech, I have spent the past 2 years developing backend solutions for our fintech applications. My primary focus has been on building and maintaining our microservices architecture using Go. This involves writing efficient, scalable code and implementing gRPC for inter-service communication. Working closely with the DevOps team, I have gained experience with Kubernetes, helping to streamline our deployment processes and improve our CI/CD pipelines.

Some key contributions include:
- Designed and implemented RESTful APIs that serve over 10,000 daily users, ensuring high availability and responsiveness.
- Collaborated with frontend developers to integrate user-facing elements with server-side logic, optimizing the overall performance of our applications.
- Assisted in migrating databases from older systems to PostgreSQL, enhancing data integrity and query performance.

Prior to NordFin, I worked at FinSol Inc. as an intern for about a year, where I primarily focused on database management and backend support. I helped manage the PostgreSQL instances and was part of a team that optimized database queries, which resulted in a significant reduction in load times for critical services.

I was also responsible for monitoring system performance and debugging issues, which gave me hands-on experience in troubleshooting under pressure. My ability to adapt and learn quickly has been crucial, particularly when new technologies and tools are introduced. 

In addition to technical responsibilities, I have participated in team agile ceremonies, providing input on sprint planning and reviews, and often took the initiative to pair program with colleagues to tackle complex challenges.

Overall, my experience in fintech has provided me with a solid foundation in backend development, and I am eager to continue building on my skills and contributing to innovative solutions in this space.
